=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (9:3-9:15) TS377099: `Effect.ignore` expresses ignored failure more directly than `Effect.catch` returning `Effect.void`. effect(catchToIgnore)
  Fix 0: "Disable catchToIgnore for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable catchToIgnore for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Replace with Effect.ignore"

[D2] (14:3-14:20) TS377099: `Effect.ignoreCause` expresses ignored failure more directly than `Effect.catchCause` returning `Effect.void`. effect(catchToIgnore)
  Fix 0: "Disable catchToIgnore for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable catchToIgnore for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Replace with Effect.ignoreCause"

[D3] (20:3-20:15) TS377099: `Effect.ignore` expresses ignored failure more directly than `Effect.catch` returning `Effect.void`. effect(catchToIgnore)
  Fix 0: "Disable catchToIgnore for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable catchToIgnore for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Replace with Effect.ignore"

[D4] (25:3-25:15) TS377099: `Effect.ignore` expresses ignored failure more directly than `Effect.catch` returning `Effect.void`. effect(catchToIgnore)
  Fix 0: "Disable catchToIgnore for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable catchToIgnore for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Replace with Effect.ignore"

[D5] (31:39-31:51) TS377099: `Effect.ignore` expresses ignored failure more directly than `Effect.catch` returning `Effect.void`. effect(catchToIgnore)
  Fix 0: "Disable catchToIgnore for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable catchToIgnore for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Replace with Effect.ignore"

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D1] Fix 0: "Disable catchToIgnore for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 1: "Disable catchToIgnore for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 2: "Replace with Effect.ignore" ===

--- file:///.src/catchToIgnore.ts ---
import { Effect, pipe } from "effect"

declare const voidEffect: Effect.Effect<void, string, never>
declare const undefinedEffect: Effect.Effect<undefined, string, never>
declare const numberEffect: Effect.Effect<number, string, never>

// Should trigger: catch returning Effect.void on a void success channel
export const shouldTriggerCatch = voidEffect.pipe(
  Effect.ignore
)

// Should trigger: catchCause returning Effect.void on a void success channel
export const shouldTriggerCatchCause = voidEffect.pipe(
  Effect.catchCause((_cause) => Effect.void)
)

// Should trigger: pipe style
export const shouldTriggerPipe = pipe(
  Effect.fail("error"),
  Effect.catch(() => Effect.void)
)

// Should trigger: block body
export const shouldTriggerBlock = undefinedEffect.pipe(
  Effect.catch(() => {
    return Effect.void
  })
)

// Should trigger: data-first style
export const shouldTriggerDataFirst = Effect.catch(voidEffect, () => Effect.void)

// Should NOT trigger: Effect.ignore would discard the number success value
export const shouldNotTriggerValueSuccess = numberEffect.pipe(
  Effect.catch(() => Effect.void)
)

// Should NOT trigger: fallback is not exactly Effect.void
export const shouldNotTriggerOtherFallback = voidEffect.pipe(
  Effect.catch(() => Effect.sync(() => undefined))
)


=== [D2] Fix 0: "Disable catchToIgnore for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 1: "Disable catchToIgnore for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 2: "Replace with Effect.ignoreCause" ===

--- file:///.src/catchToIgnore.ts ---
import { Effect, pipe } from "effect"

declare const voidEffect: Effect.Effect<void, string, never>
declare const undefinedEffect: Effect.Effect<undefined, string, never>
declare const numberEffect: Effect.Effect<number, string, never>

// Should trigger: catch returning Effect.void on a void success channel
export const shouldTriggerCatch = voidEffect.pipe(
  Effect.catch(() => Effect.void)
)

// Should trigger: catchCause returning Effect.void on a void success channel
export const shouldTriggerCatchCause = voidEffect.pipe(
  Effect.ignoreCause
)

// Should trigger: pipe style
export const shouldTriggerPipe = pipe(
  Effect.fail("error"),
  Effect.catch(() => Effect.void)
)

// Should trigger: block body
export const shouldTriggerBlock = undefinedEffect.pipe(
  Effect.catch(() => {
    return Effect.void
  })
)

// Should trigger: data-first style
export const shouldTriggerDataFirst = Effect.catch(voidEffect, () => Effect.void)

// Should NOT trigger: Effect.ignore would discard the number success value
export const shouldNotTriggerValueSuccess = numberEffect.pipe(
  Effect.catch(() => Effect.void)
)

// Should NOT trigger: fallback is not exactly Effect.void
export const shouldNotTriggerOtherFallback = voidEffect.pipe(
  Effect.catch(() => Effect.sync(() => undefined))
)


=== [D3] Fix 0: "Disable catchToIgnore for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D3] Fix 1: "Disable catchToIgnore for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D3] Fix 2: "Replace with Effect.ignore" ===

--- file:///.src/catchToIgnore.ts ---
import { Effect, pipe } from "effect"

declare const voidEffect: Effect.Effect<void, string, never>
declare const undefinedEffect: Effect.Effect<undefined, string, never>
declare const numberEffect: Effect.Effect<number, string, never>

// Should trigger: catch returning Effect.void on a void success channel
export const shouldTriggerCatch = voidEffect.pipe(
  Effect.catch(() => Effect.void)
)

// Should trigger: catchCause returning Effect.void on a void success channel
export const shouldTriggerCatchCause = voidEffect.pipe(
  Effect.catchCause((_cause) => Effect.void)
)

// Should trigger: pipe style
export const shouldTriggerPipe = pipe(
  Effect.fail("error"),
  Effect.ignore
)

// Should trigger: block body
export const shouldTriggerBlock = undefinedEffect.pipe(
  Effect.catch(() => {
    return Effect.void
  })
)

// Should trigger: data-first style
export const shouldTriggerDataFirst = Effect.catch(voidEffect, () => Effect.void)

// Should NOT trigger: Effect.ignore would discard the number success value
export const shouldNotTriggerValueSuccess = numberEffect.pipe(
  Effect.catch(() => Effect.void)
)

// Should NOT trigger: fallback is not exactly Effect.void
export const shouldNotTriggerOtherFallback = voidEffect.pipe(
  Effect.catch(() => Effect.sync(() => undefined))
)


=== [D4] Fix 0: "Disable catchToIgnore for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D4] Fix 1: "Disable catchToIgnore for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D4] Fix 2: "Replace with Effect.ignore" ===

--- file:///.src/catchToIgnore.ts ---
import { Effect, pipe } from "effect"

declare const voidEffect: Effect.Effect<void, string, never>
declare const undefinedEffect: Effect.Effect<undefined, string, never>
declare const numberEffect: Effect.Effect<number, string, never>

// Should trigger: catch returning Effect.void on a void success channel
export const shouldTriggerCatch = voidEffect.pipe(
  Effect.catch(() => Effect.void)
)

// Should trigger: catchCause returning Effect.void on a void success channel
export const shouldTriggerCatchCause = voidEffect.pipe(
  Effect.catchCause((_cause) => Effect.void)
)

// Should trigger: pipe style
export const shouldTriggerPipe = pipe(
  Effect.fail("error"),
  Effect.catch(() => Effect.void)
)

// Should trigger: block body
export const shouldTriggerBlock = undefinedEffect.pipe(
  Effect.ignore
)

// Should trigger: data-first style
export const shouldTriggerDataFirst = Effect.catch(voidEffect, () => Effect.void)

// Should NOT trigger: Effect.ignore would discard the number success value
export const shouldNotTriggerValueSuccess = numberEffect.pipe(
  Effect.catch(() => Effect.void)
)

// Should NOT trigger: fallback is not exactly Effect.void
export const shouldNotTriggerOtherFallback = voidEffect.pipe(
  Effect.catch(() => Effect.sync(() => undefined))
)


=== [D5] Fix 0: "Disable catchToIgnore for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D5] Fix 1: "Disable catchToIgnore for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D5] Fix 2: "Replace with Effect.ignore" ===

--- file:///.src/catchToIgnore.ts ---
import { Effect, pipe } from "effect"

declare const voidEffect: Effect.Effect<void, string, never>
declare const undefinedEffect: Effect.Effect<undefined, string, never>
declare const numberEffect: Effect.Effect<number, string, never>

// Should trigger: catch returning Effect.void on a void success channel
export const shouldTriggerCatch = voidEffect.pipe(
  Effect.catch(() => Effect.void)
)

// Should trigger: catchCause returning Effect.void on a void success channel
export const shouldTriggerCatchCause = voidEffect.pipe(
  Effect.catchCause((_cause) => Effect.void)
)

// Should trigger: pipe style
export const shouldTriggerPipe = pipe(
  Effect.fail("error"),
  Effect.catch(() => Effect.void)
)

// Should trigger: block body
export const shouldTriggerBlock = undefinedEffect.pipe(
  Effect.catch(() => {
    return Effect.void
  })
)

// Should trigger: data-first style
export const shouldTriggerDataFirst = Effect.ignore(voidEffect)

// Should NOT trigger: Effect.ignore would discard the number success value
export const shouldNotTriggerValueSuccess = numberEffect.pipe(
  Effect.catch(() => Effect.void)
)

// Should NOT trigger: fallback is not exactly Effect.void
export const shouldNotTriggerOtherFallback = voidEffect.pipe(
  Effect.catch(() => Effect.sync(() => undefined))
)
